reasoning: The control AC-4(13) focuses on enforcing secure information flow through policy decomposition, which can be mapped to ensuring secure transport and communication within Kubernetes. This involves enforcing TLS for network communication, ingress, and service mesh, as well as ensuring the API server uses TLS for secure communication. These checks ensure that data in transit is encrypted and secure, aligning with the control's focus on secure information flow.
title: Information Flow Enforcement - Information flow enforcement | decomposition into policy - relevant subcomponent
